title: Mahabharat
subTitle: A dynastic struggle between the collateral branches of the Kuru clan, the Kauravas and Pandavas, for the throne of Hastinapur leads to the Kurukshetra War.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Ek Rishtaa: The Bond of Love
subTitle: Amid the ideological differences with his father Vijay, Ajay steps up to protect his family from Rajesh's, his brother-in-law's, evil intentions.

title: Dosti: Friends Forever
subTitle: Karan, a wealthy heir, lives a lonely life and is neglected by his family. When he has a fatal accident, Raj, a poor orphan, saves his life and they become inseparable friends.

title: Vaishnavi
subTitle: Born with the divine power, Vaishnavi receives treatment as a goddess by the villagers. After getting killed, she possesses the body of another girl who looks like her to exact revenge for her death.

title: Naach Lucky Naach
subTitle: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Velaiilla Pattadhari
subTitle: Raghuvaran, an educated yet unemployed engineer, is unwilling to accept jobs that are unrelated to his area of expertise. Soon, his mother's tragic death brings him a job as well as grave challenges.

title: Race 3
subTitle: The thirst for power drives a wealthy family to become rivals in a risky heist. As a consequence, they face betrayal and danger along the way.

title: Akbar Birbal
subTitle: Clever Birbal aids Emperor Akbar in witty adventures, solving puzzles and delivering justice across Mughal India, unfolding tales of wisdom and humor.

title: Hello Main Hoon
subTitle: A man steals a mobile of an accident victim without knowing that he will face a mysterious incident and later faces a ghost that resides in the device.

title: Good Newwz
subTitle: Two married couples are unsuccessful in conceiving and seek medical treatment. However, they end up in a complicated situation after their doctor makes a blunder.

title: Radhe Shyam
subTitle: Despite being a doctor with no inclination towards superstitious beliefs, Prerana places her love and faith in Aditya, a palmist whose predictions turn out to be too spot-on to be disregarded.

title: April 28 Em Jarigindi
subTitle: A famous writer's life changes when his road trip to get an inspiration for his new work leads him to face spirits and paranormal activities.

title: Horror Shark
subTitle: An accident causes a great white shark to turn into a killing mutant. However, the problem worsens when the beast receives the ability to overpower humans.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Crocodile Island
subTitle: Stranded passengers must fight against man-eating crocodiles after their plane makes an emergency landing on a remote island.

title: Ramayan
subTitle: Rama, the brave prince of Ayodhya, sets out to rescue his wife Sita from an evil Ravana, facing an ultimate test of loyalty.

title: Ghajini
subTitle: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

title: Loveyatri
subTitle: Sushrut who runs a Garba academy falls in love with a beautiful NRI, Michelle, but her father creates a rift between the two. However, Sushrut is determined to win her back.

title: Pakka Commercial
subTitle: A dishonest lawyer takes on a notorious client. However, the case puts him against his morally-minded father, an ex-judge with a past of his own.

title: Super Taxi
subTitle: Shiva settles for the job of a taxicab driver after quitting several odd jobs. However, things take a turn when he faces spine-chilling incidents while driving and tries to solve the mystery.

title: Snake
subTitle: A young farm girl, ensnared by a sinister stranger's lies, must wield the truth to rescue her family from impending danger.

title: Acharya
subTitle: On behalf of an idyllic temple town, Acharya takes up the cudgels against a tyrant whose greedy sights are set on the local natural resources.
